ceiling_note: Theoretical perfect run: 7 compass-type Rainbow cogwheels, SSS rating + clockwork_51, max Alice procs. Probability ~0; used as 100% reference only.

services.name: Roses in the No-Man's Land
services.effect: All monsters in the stage are replaced with Low-Level Doll Employees. There are only 7 Rainbow Cogwheels in this stage.

services.name: Nut Trick
services.effect: Upon obtaining 3 Cogwheel Vouchers of the same rarity in a row, change the rarity of these 3 Cogwheel Vouchers to Rainbow.

services.name: Clockwork Ballet Heist
services.effect: When completing the last Operation Cogwheel in the stage, 3 Runaway Dancers will appear. You obtain 1 Cogwheel Voucher of a random rarity, up to Red, for each Runaway Dancer defeated.

services.name: Clockwork Roulette
services.effect: Every time you obtain a Cogwheel Voucher, you also obtain 1 additional Cogwheel Voucher of a random rarity, and +1 to the number of Cogwheel Vouchers you obtain next time. +10% chance to immediately lose the challenge when starting Operation Cogwheel. When defeated, you lose all Cogwheel Vouchers and this Member Service expires.

services.name: Bloody Mary
services.effect: After Clockwork Ballet Games begin, immediately obtain 3-5 Cogwheel Vouchers (Purple or above). Failure to submit Cogwheel Vouchers causes you to lose the challenge. Default rating SS, default time 15s, but Bloody Mary starts chasing after 3s.

services.name: All Tabs on Me
services.effect: 1-2 Rainbow Cogwheels appear in the stage. Cogwheel Vouchers can't be exchanged until Operation Cogwheel is fully completed.

services.name: Best Doll Employee
services.effect: A Best Doll Employee appears at start. Upon completing Operation Cogwheel, 20% chance to obtain 1 additional Cogwheel Voucher more likely to be a higher rarity.

services.name: Triple Combo Bonus
services.effect: Upon completing Operation Cogwheel 3 times in a row within 30s, obtain 2 additional Orange Cogwheel Vouchers.

services.name: Instant Voucher Cache
services.effect: After Clockwork Ballet Games begin, immediately obtain 2-3 Cogwheel Vouchers (up to Orange).

services.name: Cogwheel Gambler
services.effect: Upon completing Operation Cogwheel: 40% chance +1 Cogwheel Voucher, 20% chance +2, 5% chance +3, and 10% chance to end the game and exchange all owned Cogwheels immediately.

services.name: Dolls' Hunting Ground
services.effect: Time gained is doubled at start, and 50% chance to obtain 1 additional Cogwheel Voucher more likely to be higher rarity. Game ends immediately if defeated. Default time 15s, default rating S.

services.name: All-or-Nothing Rating
services.effect: The stage has 6 Cogwheels. If your rating is below B, you won't obtain any rating effects, but you obtain all rating effects at once when achieving B or higher.

services.name: Booster Drinks
services.effect: There are 2 Booster Drinks in this stage. Touching a Booster Drink drops additional rewards.

services.name: Dual Rarity Boost
services.effect: After Clockwork Ballet Games begin, +1 rarity for 2 randomly selected Cogwheel(s) in the stage.

services.name: Lucky Upgrade + Time
services.effect: Upon completing Operation Cogwheel, 30% chance to +1 rarity for all obtained Cogwheel Vouchers and gain 10s remaining time.

services.name: Lucky Upgrade
services.effect: Upon completing Operation Cogwheel, 30% chance to +1 rarity for all obtained Cogwheel Vouchers.

services.name: Cogwheel Culling
services.effect: After Clockwork Ballet Games begin, randomly remove 1-2 Cogwheels from the stage and +1 rarity for the remaining Cogwheels.

services.name: Rare Bonus Voucher
services.effect: Upon completing Operation Cogwheel, 10% chance to obtain 1 additional Cogwheel Voucher more likely to be a higher rarity.

services.name: Single Rarity Boost
services.effect: After Clockwork Ballet Games begin, +1 rarity for 1 randomly selected Cogwheel in the stage.

services.name: Starter Voucher
services.effect: After Clockwork Ballet Games begin, immediately obtain 1 Cogwheel Voucher (Blue).

services.name: Every-4th Bonus
services.effect: For every 4 Operation Cogwheel completions, obtain 1 additional Blue Cogwheel Voucher.

services.name: Time Extender
services.effect: There is 1 Time Extender in this stage. Touching a Time Extender drops additional rewards.

services.name: Runaway Dancer Hunt
services.effect: After completing Operation Cogwheel, 15% chance a Runaway Dancer appears. Defeat it for 1 Orange Cogwheel Voucher.

services.name: Late-Game Bonus
services.effect: Upon completing Operation Cogwheel, if remaining time is greater than 20s, 15% chance to obtain 1 additional Cogwheel Voucher.

services.name: Rush Bonus
services.effect: Upon completing Operation Cogwheel, if remaining time is under 20s, 30% chance to obtain 1 additional Cogwheel Voucher.

services.name: Clockwork Roulette (escalating fail model)
services.effect: Every time you obtain a Cogwheel Voucher, you also obtain 1 additional Cogwheel Voucher of a random rarity, and +1 to the number of Cogwheel Vouchers you obtain next time. +10% chance to immediately lose the challenge when starting Operation Cogwheel. When defeated, you lose all Cogwheel Vouchers and this Member Service expires.
